channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Forget max pain theory. Bitcoin is well below the $72,000 magnet going into $10 billion options expiry
item.description: The popular max pain theory isn’t working out as bitcoin trades far from the $72K level a day ahead of a $10 billion quarterly options settlement.

item.title: US arbitration giant rolls out ‘legal layer’ for agentic commerce
item.description: As agentic AI transactions increase, “we need to know there’s a clear answer to what happens if something goes wrong,” said Mance Harmon, co-founder of Hedera.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin, ether lead $1 billion liquidation losses as AI trade keeps going
item.description: A liquidation flush took bitcoin to its lowest since early June before Micron's blowout earnings and SK Hynix's U.S. listing plans steadied the AI trade that crypto had been sliding alongside.

item.title: House Democrats seek SEC answers on AI investment advisers
item.description: House Democrats have questioned the SEC over trading platforms offering AI agent advisers making “consequential investment decisions on behalf of retail investors.”

item.title: MemeCore's M token suddenly crashes 80% with no clear trigger
item.description: The token fell from nearly $3 to about $0.50 in hours, wiping out close to $3 billion in market value, with no exploit or announcement to explain it. Onchain investigator ZachXBT warned in April that M's price had been propped up by inside…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin goes live in Japan after regulatory approval
item.description: Japan's financial regulator cleared the U.S. dollar-backed token as a new category of payment instrument, letting SBI VC Trade offer it to institutions and retail. RLUSD remains small, at about $1.7 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin has a new line in the sand. Thursday’s core PCE could stress test it.
item.description: The market has found a new support level and it could be tested following Thursday's U.S. inflation data.

item.title: XRP slides 2.8% as weak bounce keeps $1 support in focus
item.description: Sellers broke another support level on heavy volume, while the recovery failed to reclaim the zone that would ease downside pressure.

item.title: Bitcoin back above $60,000, ETH, SOL recoup losses as AI stocks stage rebound
item.description: The token fell to about $59,000 before buyers stepped in, but the week's losses are steep across the board. A blowout Micron forecast lifted stocks and oil kept sliding, yet crypto did not follow.

item.title: Abracadabra takes emergency action as MIM stablecoin depeg worsens
item.description: The protocol is raising interest rates across all Cauldrons to encourage debt repayment and reduce supply.

item.title: Kalshi seeks funding at $40B valuation, nearly doubling last raise: FT
item.description: Kalshi is reportedly in talks to raise new capital at a $40 billion valuation, reflecting growing investor confidence in regulated prediction markets.

item.title: Coinbase Secures Luxembourg MiCA License to Serve All 27 EU States Coinbase, the largest U.S. crypto exchange, said it has secured a MiCA license from Luxembourg’s financial regulator CSSF and will make Luxembourg its European crypto hub. The lice - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1TeWlEMW9TS0xNNkdaOXU1UVV1Slg2Ung2TllmOEdVXzQ5LVZtY3BSMURYUGlxOW1YdVd2MzhqOW5rTmE4TnRYUjlkLTBjWTd1M0prQll0eVpQRnlmTHVHeUV2SQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Coinbase Secures Luxembourg MiCA…

item.title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
item.description: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.

item.title: HYPE down 22% from record highs: Will spot demand revive the uptrend?
item.description: HYPE price drops near a key support zone where fading selling pressure collides with shrinking futures market activity. Will the altcoin resume its uptrend above $60?

item.title: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
item.description: Illinois is set to institute a new tax on prediction markets next week that would take 15% of gross receipts from sports-related wagers.

item.title: FTX exec’s wife scheduled for November trial on campaign finance charges
item.description: A Manhattan judge ordered that Michelle Bond’s criminal trial start in November after he denied a motion to dismiss the indictment based on claims that prosecutors misled her husband over her charges.

item.title: The Next GameStop? Meme Stock Traders Make Biggie-Size Bet on Wendy's
item.description: Shares in fast-food chain Wendy's might be the next hot meme stock for retail investors hungry for a cause.

item.title: Bitcoin nearly loses $59K as DXY surges: Are traders bracing for more pain?
item.description: Bitcoin drops toward new 2026 lows as spot BTC ETF outflows and slowing accumulation from Strategy weigh on market sentiment.

item.title: 'Painful' Bitcoin Sell-Off Drags Ethereum, XRP and Dogecoin Lower as Crypto Stocks Dive
item.description: Bitcoin's slide to its lowest point in 21 months slammed the price of leading altcoins, while pressuring crypto stocks on Wall Street.

item.title: Your Hermes Agent Now Has a Pet. It Does Nothing—And That’s the Point
item.description: Nous Research added animated mascot sprites to the self-improving AI agent—and the only thing they do is look cute while your AI works.

item.title: Upheaval at the Ethereum Foundation has some of crypto’s biggest names feeling bullish
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at Ethereum's eventful week that started off with the launch of EthLabs, plus the layoffs at the Ethereum Foundation, and what this all means for the network.

item.title: Kalshi targets a massive $40 billion valuation, widening lead over rival Polymarket
item.description: The prediction market operator, which is eyeing a potential public debut in 2027, could close a new funding round in Q3, according to a Financial Times report.

item.title: Kalshi sues Illinois officials over prediction markets restrictions
item.description: The prediction markets company claimed that it would be “irreparably harmed” when an Illinois law signed as part of a budget package goes in effect on July 1.

item.title: Leaked Code Suggests Anthropic Is Preparing to Bring Fable 5 Back
item.description: A leaker found new strings inside Claude Code that hint at weekly Fable 5 usage built into subscription plans, not sold separately as before.

item.title: Researcher Throws Cold Water on Microsoft Quantum Claims
item.description: A physicist's formal critique argues Microsoft has not demonstrated the topological qubit behind its Majorana 2 quantum chip.

item.title: 'Stop Buying Bitcoin': Strategy Needs More Cash Fast, Analyst Says as STRC Hits New Low
item.description: STRC fell even lower Wednesday while MSTR bleeds. CryptoQuant says that Strategy needs to stop buying Bitcoin and start stacking cash.

item.title: Luxembourg has established itself as the EU’s leading hub for institutional crypto and tokenization. The country has long taken a thoughtful, innovation-oriented approach to blockchain technology and to digital assets. That is why we are delighted to have chos - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBBM1REVW92aGF1ZXRrSmttbXZjdXFIVENJQXZqWGl5VERlbTRUZlR5WWtIS1NHWE53VmtsQ0ViT3ZLcVpveUtxcjV1b3drbzJ4cmpuaUt1cUhCd2ZxOTI2LVZfTXI?oc=5" target="_blank">Luxembourg has established itse…

item.title: Binance Withdraws MiCA License Application in Greece, Leaving EU Users in Limbo
item.description: Crypto exchange Binance formally withdrew its MiCA license application in Greece, one week after a report said it would be denied.

item.title: Crypto-backed candidates notch wins in three US state primaries
item.description: The crypto-aligned Fairshake PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $8 million on media to support candidates in Maryland, New York and Utah amid pushback from many criticizing “crypto billionaires.”

item.title: It's official: Crypto has now erased more than HALF of its value in just 8 months. On October 6th, 2025, the total market cap of crypto hit a record $4.3 trillion. Today, 261 days later, crypto is worth just $2.0 trillion, marking a -54% decline in value. This means cry - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1LNkM5TW1OVmdfMEN0SzdVZGI5SW1LaHFqWnFfTUstbjEteWVuY3Z1dndJMTZ0cV9ERVViS3YtMmpIU0piNWpHcjl0TGVWSnI3WHpncnA3bUFGcVZTY3BRUjZ0bjhtUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">It's official: Crypto has no…

item.title: I need all the #bitcoin and #crypto people who say it’s going to a million and how it’s the future to tell me why all the people who have always said it’s a scam and going to zero are wrong. Cause it seems like it’s going to zero - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1ZOWRWRU5kbWd5SUhSaFVUaEtvZi14ZmYxVzNWODFVX0VQMXNlVDNucVlQNjlYMTdvaTlvazBDLVZzbnJXUURXbHdWTE45bmxFTXdaejhGZk1QVGtxbDNacTNMS2VoWkU?oc=5" target="_blank">I need all the #bitcoin and…

item.title: Fake Crypto Influencer Gets 15 Months for $1.4M Telegram Staking Fraud
item.description: Noman Saleem impersonated crypto influencers on Telegram, luring victims into a fake staking scheme before vanishing with their funds.

item.title: Binance withdraws Greek MiCA bid but vows to remain in Europe
item.description: The crypto giant must find a home base in the EU by July 1 or regulators will force the company to shut down operations for millions of regional users.

item.title: Bitcoin falls under $60K, but traders anticipate 15% bounce
item.description: Bitcoin price dropped below $60,000 for the first time in weeks, but data shows traders betting on a relief bounce.

item.title: Bitcoin Hasn't Broken the 4-Year Cycle Yet, Says 21Shares as BTC Dives Below $60K
item.description: As Bitcoin falls below the $60,000 mark, 21Shares said that its prediction that BTC breaks the historical four-year cycle hasn't come true.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls under $60,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFA5UnFYUVcwSnFVdmY3Znd3X2RuVzNVMG1LZEhXTFhzaW9QVlNIaTZ1OF90M0FTMl9hOXRNOWNZdWhLekFKWXBZSTZ6UXZLQktUOEdEdGNIdW5maTZuV0ItVW5n?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls under $60,…

item.title: Bitcoin crash to $60K opens new $530M demand zone: Will bulls buy in?
item.description: A $525 million Bitcoin buy wall intersects with a major liquidation zone, creating a key battleground between $60,500 and $65,000.

item.title: JUST IN: $12.6 trillion Charles Schwab officially rolls out Bitcoin trading 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0tSV9SNnJKemp4MnZVVFM3TGNiNEJ3MUI2SnpDdVBtSXhqSjFHTGZCUUdXdk56UWFCdVo2czNxLVhoZmd1aHpXeS0zSENaUk5GbTJEUHdJb3VqcFYwOEM2WURLUDhkYVk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12.6 trillion Cha…

item.title: South Korean Officials Meet With US SEC, Weigh Unified Crypto Rules Amid Local Scandals
item.description: Following a series of setbacks for South Korea, a delegation from one of Asia's most active crypto markets met with the SEC's task force.

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000 as AI trade continues to draw investor interest and capital
item.description: South Korean memory chip giant on Wednesday filed to raise nearly $30 billion in a U.S. offering.

item.title: $STRC breaking to new lows, dragging #Bitcoin along. Altcoins not moving with Bitcoin, as the BTC pairs are mostly all up, indicating that this is solely dedicated to the entire sage surrounding STRC. Don't sell your #Bitcoin, that's the whole design of this corre - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9fSDNPTnRzcERyTGFTcEJlMUFmeFltUDFTTXBHNWo5SWFWYkhDR3JPd0Jfd3FZcmpUMEg5dnNQRVFrOGtoeFUxclhLZlRnTWtkVlRQR0EzMENTV0VXMHBkbXFzbw?oc=5" target="_blank">$STRC breaking to new lows, drag…

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Infrastructure is the prevailing currency in digital assets
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Nonco’s Caue Teixeira makes the case that regardless of which coin ultimately wins, infrastructure is the prevailing currency in digital assets. Then, using CoinDesk's liquidation feed, Liquibit Capital'…

item.title: Credit unions managing $25B in assets join stablecoin infrastructure program
item.description: A new pilot from Stablecore, Circuit and Curql gives participating US credit unions access to test stablecoin payments and other digital asset services.

item.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application
item.description: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

item.title: SecondFi loses $2.4 million in Cardano wallet exploit
item.description: SecondFi was hit by three separate attacks exploiting a flaw in its wallet generation software. A further 129 million ADA was secured by the team before attackers could reach it.

item.title: Trump's refusal to sign housing bill could delay Congress and imperil Clarity Act
item.description: As Congress prepared to celebrate the president's signing of the bipartisan housing bill that contains a CBDC prohibition, Trump abruptly cancelled the event.

item.title: OpenAI Turns Up the Heat With Jalapeño, Its First Custom AI Chip
item.description: Built with Broadcom, the LLM-focused accelerator is the first step in OpenAI's effort to design the hardware behind ChatGPT and beyond.

item.title: Trump Cancels Signing of Bipartisan Housing Bill Containing CBDC Ban: 'Of Minor Importance'
item.description: President Trump said he won’t sign the popular bill until Congress passes a controversial bill restricting voting rights.

item.title: Ex-FCA policy insider explains the ‘great divide’ in the UK’s crypto ambition
item.description: Former FCA policymaker and Hedera Global Policy VP, Isadora Arredondo says there is a gap between the U.K.'s crypto ambitions and how policy is carried out in practice.

item.title: Trump cancels signing of housing bill with CBDC ban
item.description: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act included a provision that the US Federal Reserve was barred from issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030, but exempted certain stablecoins.

item.title: The Impossibility of Perfect Fairness in Transaction Ordering
item.description: Why perfect fairness cannot hold in asynchronous networks, and how different blockchains adopt different relaxations to fairness.

item.title: BREAKING: US Bitcoin ETFs saw -$6.4 billion in outflows over the last 30 days, the largest 30-day outflow on record. Last week alone, Bitcoin ETFs posted -$233 million in withdrawals. Overall, crypto funds saw -$116 million in outflows last week, marking the 5 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1rLUJ1eW9CeWRDY3FTcS1fNnVKQ2NtNTV2cHpKS2hFSld6RXpJX1pWczZBcWI2M1JsV0lINjB3S1M0b2cwelBuVnpkeE5kOGsyZTNSUm4yTXZmYTNBSnpISkVyaXdfUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: US Bitcoin ETFs sa…

item.title: Bitcoin just broke below the floor of its famous Rainbow Chart into the ‘BTC is dead’ zone
item.description: A 50% drop from recent highs has pushed the asset into a zone historically labeled as a dead end, sparking a debate among crypto analysts.

item.title: The banking lobby is wrong about stablecoins and community banks
item.description: Congress should not kneecap one of the clearest advances in payment infrastructure to protect community banks from a threat that has not been proven, argues Eco CEO Ryne Saxe.

item.title: Strategy Shares Crash Below $100 as Bitcoin Sinks Towards $60K
item.description: Bitcoin fell to a two-week low price Wednesday as Strategy shares dove below the $100 mark for the first time since March 2024.

item.title: How memecoin marketing moved from online speculation to real-world risk
item.description: From alcohol dares to head-shaving challenges, memecoin campaigns are turning engagement into exploitation.

item.title: DeFi TVL drops 39% in 2026 amid market downturn and record hack activity
item.description: DeFi TVL fell 39% in 2026 as a broader market downturn and fallout from major exploits, including the Kelp DAO hack, weighed on the sector.

item.title: INSIGHT: @binance founder @cz_binance says U.S. crypto traders pay higher prices due to poor liquidity, and wants @BinanceUS to tap global exchange liquidity to fix it. "Crypto is the only place where U.S. consumers do not have the best prices." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBOaGxqNlFjU2REOHVxbVlDRjF1eUluRHNuRk9HYjZhOVp1bjFmYjVScmhQTVRFbWx1UFdNM0dkTEtiV0VpZkNHNTNPUE1NRG9QSy1hc3JBcURrOWF6eGc?oc=5" target="_blank">INSIGHT: @binance founder @cz_binance s…

item.title: Gold, silver and bitcoin tumble as 'debasement' trade unwinds
item.description: Precious metals have fallen sharply from their 2025 highs as markets price in Fed rate hikes.
